title: Set up Tailwind CSS v4 with CSS-first configuration
summary: Complete Tailwind CSS v4 setup — CSS-first config with @import, @theme customization, PostCSS plugin, dark mode, and v3 migration guidance.
declaration: Tailwind CSS v4 uses a CSS-first configuration model — there is no tailwind.config.js. I will set up Tailwind v4 using @tailwindcss/postcss, the new @import syntax, and @theme blocks for customization. If you need Tailwind v3 instead, say so before I begin.
